subcodes.first_line: O thou herald of the Covenant! The letter that thou didst address to Jinab-i-Manshadi hath been perused. Regarding [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی میثاق مکتوبی که بجناب منشادی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید در خصوص
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @chastisement and requital, @non-participation in politics, @obedience to and respect for government authority
